prompt: I make YouTube videos about AI tools. I need help organizing my research notes, scripts, and production files so Claude can help me at each stage without forgetting my brand voice guidelines

assertions.text: Response uses content-appropriate stage names (not generic code stages)
Response includes a dedicated voice or brand guidelines file with tone and audience sections
Response uses structured stage contracts with Inputs/Process/Outputs format
Response explains how brand voice stays persistent across stages
Response explains how output from one stage feeds into the next
